name: A Zone
short_description: A Zone is a leisure game of black and white painting style It contains stubble finding and elimination elements
detailed_description:
A Zone is a leisure game of black and white painting style
This is a horizontal and oblique elimination type game
Cooperate to find the elements of the game
At the same time, you get 100 points each time
Unlock a stubble game

I'm a depressed person.
The pressure of working and living every day makes me gasp for breath.
But I really want to be happy.
I also like making games.
My abilities are limited.
One day scribbled on paper about what I wanted to do.
A sudden idea flashed through my mind.
I want to bring you a simple and discovery-based game.
I hope this graffiti-type game can bring happiness to everyone.

If you are tired, let go of your boredom.
Maybe this little game won't bring you anything.
But I want world peace.

I hope you can support my creation.
I really hope I can continue to make all kinds of games for you.~
I love you! I hope everyone can be happy!
At least not as depressed as I am.
I want people who love me, too.
I also want to experience the feeling of being loved.
